channel.title: Project Green SD on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Project Green SD on CEDIS

item.title: Green Software Development Project
item.description: This project aims to highlight the importance of understanding the field of Green Software Development and bringing it into companies.

item.title: People
item.description: Associate Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program.

item.title: Publications
item.description: Conference by COSTA CÉSAR, ANA CAROLINA, DA GAMA PIVETTA, GABRIELA, Mendes, Fabiana Freitas (2022).

item.title: Publications
item.description: Tcc by Gabriela da Gama Piveta (2021).
